title: teucrium subspinosum var. spinescens
intro: Teucrium subspinosum var. spinescens, also known as Spiny Woodland Germander or Spiny Teucrium, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Teucrium subspinosum var. spinescens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
